falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 10% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish trend reversal, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surges to 3x the 90-day average on a single day within the 14-day window
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a spike in volume would signal massive market participation or panic, invalidating the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by confirming a clear directional move (either blowoff top or violent bottom).

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks above the prior 52-week high by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would directly contradict the 'bottom_2024_aug' pattern's implied bearish context, proving the current HOLD verdict incorrect by confirming a new bull market phase.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
